name: typed-prompt
title: Typed Prompt
description: A prompt line types itself in chunked human cadence behind a deterministic blinking caret, with optional backspace-and-retype correction of the final word.
evidence: Wave J J1-2 typed-prompt specification; discrete-text-sequence mechanic (SEQ table + textAt lookup + integer-cycle caret) generalized from the cohere-north agent-at-work frame

variables.label: Prompt glyph
variables.description: Leading glyph before the typed line. Empty string hides it.

variables.label: Cadence
variables.description: Keystroke rhythm: uniform fixed steps or seeded human chunks.

variables.label: Caret
variables.description: Blink runs integer sine cycles during typing then goes solid.

variables.label: Correction
variables.description: Mistyped word typed in place of the final word, then backspaced and corrected. Empty disables.

variables.label: Cues
variables.description: Comma-separated seconds relative to mount start; cue N anchors the start of word N. Empty uses the authored rhythm.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Color of the prompt glyph and caret.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Outgoing transition. Frame roots own transitions; none holds the end frame.
